_comment: DO NOT EDIT — export/import this file directly into Pterodactyl Admin → Nests → Import Egg
name: TRUTH-MD WhatsApp Bot
author: truth-md@courtneytech.xyz
description: TRUTH-MD WhatsApp Bot powered by Baileys. Session-driven, no OWNER_NUMBER required. PostgreSQL sessions survive restarts.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
apt-get update -y
apt-get install -y git ffmpeg imagemagick webp curl

cd /mnt/server

if [ -d .git ]; then
  echo 'Pulling latest code...'
  git pull
else
  echo 'Cloning TRUTH-MD...'
  git clone https://github.com/Courtney250/TRUTH-MD.git .
fi

echo 'Installing dependencies...'
NODE_OPTIONS="--max-old-space-size=256" npm install --legacy-peer-deps --prefer-offline --no-audit --no-fund

chmod +x start.sh
echo 'Installation complete!'

variables.name: Session ID
variables.description: Your TRUTH-MD session ID. Get it from https://truth-md.courtneytech.xyz. Format: TRUTH-MD~xxxxxxx

variables.name: Database URL
variables.description: PostgreSQL connection string. Required for sessions to survive restarts. Format: postgresql://user:pass@host:5432/dbname

variables.name: Owner Number (optional)
variables.description: Owner WhatsApp number with country code e.g. 254712345678. Only set this if you want to force-pair. Leave blank for session-based login.

variables.name: Force Pair
variables.description: Set to true to request a new pairing code on next start. REMOVE after pairing is done.
